title: Replace pilot blocked_or_risky with concrete risky objects
objective: Update blocked_or_risky for the three pilot scenes so it contains only concrete objects that remain excluded from default blind-box output.
requirements: Remove non-object expressions such as folds, scratches, bubbles, shadows, highlight patches, edge lines, tiny stones, tiny sand, stains, and leaf dots.
Keep legitimate concrete risk objects such as transparent, reflective, glowing, animal-body, thin-hanging, or scale-unsafe objects.
Do not move blocked_or_risky entries into large, medium, small, or hanging buckets.
acceptance_criteria: No bad current entries remain: 纸张边缘折线, 微小擦痕, 细小气泡串, 漂浮细海草丝, 海底阴影斑, 水面高光, 微小沙粒, 草地碎叶点, 地面细小石子, 风吹纸片边缘, 野餐垫边线, 微小污点.
Every blocked_or_risky item is a concrete object.
Existing blocked leakage test continues to pass.

result.summary: Replaced non-object blocked_or_risky entries with concrete risky objects and preserved blocked leakage exclusion.
